tags.fixme: Is this purely an intermediate (block) signal, or some weird fusion of an intermediate and an absolute signal? It only has a number plate on one side...

tags.note: Pedestrian crossing is inside the span of the vehicular gates.
Pedestrian crossing is inside the span of the vehicular gates.

tags.name: Hitler Spur
tags.note: This signal is called "Hitler spur" by train crews because there used to be a munitions factory here that made munitions during World War II. This is the name crews actually call on the radio.
